original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: content-to-pipeline
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: When the user wants to turn content into revenue, build a content-led GTM motion, reverse engineer distribution, or repurpose content across platforms. Also use when the user mentions 'content marketing,' 'content-led growth,' 'content to pipeline,' 'distribution,' 'content repurposing,' 'content strategy,' 'thought leadership,' 'newsletter,' 'content flywheel,' 'organic growth.' This skill covers content-to-revenue systems from creation through pipeline attribution. Do NOT use for technical implementation, code review, or software architecture.
